title: Two-phase validate-then-write is the correct RFC 8620 §7.1 approach
description: The two-phase approach (validate all patches first, write only if all pass) is the right design for JMAP atomicity for input errors. Without SQLite transactions that span update_space_props + upsert_space_member_with_role, pre-write validation is the only practical way to enforce RFC 8620 §7.1 for user-input errors. A contributor might suggest "simplify to one pass" — that reintroduces the atomicity bug this commit specifically fixes. The comments in space_set explain the exact failing case; they should be preserved.
